title: vclaw error response
description: Stable error-code catalog for vclaw CLI JSON output. The TS source-of-truth is src/video/errors.ts ALL_ERROR_CODES.

codes.description: Slug is missing or fails isProjectSlug validation.
Referenced project slug has no workspace on disk.
A flag required by the subcommand was not provided.
The subcommand is not in the dispatch table.
--mode value is not 'storyboard' or 'director'.
Aspect ratio is not 16:9 / 9:16 / 1:1.
Referenced image file (asset or reference) is not on disk.
Referenced asset (image/video/audio) is not on disk.
Referenced template name is not registered.
Referenced character name is not in the project's characters/.
vclaw video init on a slug whose workspace already exists.
Workspace root is not writable.
Provider HTTP / native transport returned a non-recoverable error.
User-provided ..._ADAPTER command exited non-zero.
Required env var (e.g. USEAPI_API_TOKEN) is not set for the chosen route.
native-veo / native-seedance / native-runway hit an internal error.
Artifact failed its JSON-Schema validation.
projects/<slug>/ has missing or malformed canonical files.
Catch-all for unanticipated exceptions; always a bug.
Director-mode execute requires storyboard.md approval.
Director storyboard review state is 'stale'; re-run storyboard-review.
readiness check reported blockers; resolve before plan/execute.
